div1.entryFree: Whet, to rub for the purpose of sharpening: Ven. 617. Ven. 617 Merch. IV, 1, 121. H4B IV, 5, 108. R3 I, 3, 244. IV, 4, 227. Metaphorically, == to excite, to stimulate, to instigate: I come to w. your gentle thoughts on his behalf, Tw. III, 1, 116. w. me to be revenged, R3 I, 3, 332. the king does w. his anger to him, H8 III, 2, 92. Cassius first did w. me against Caesar, Caes. II, 1, 61. to w. thy almost blunted purpose, Hml. III, 4, 111. With on: I will w. on the king, John III, 4, 181. H6B II, 1, 34. H6C I, 2, 37.
